---
title: "gapminder data viz"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Gapminder analysis

We *watched* Hans Rosling **presenting** economic data...

```{r}
library(gapminder)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)


gap2002 = gapminder |>
  filter(year == 2002)
  

gap2002 |>
  ggplot() +
  aes(y = lifeExp) +
  aes(x = gdpPercap) +
  geom_point() + 
  aes(color = continent) +
  aes(size = pop)

```
